meta.definition: Entry, policy, programme, and exact-window coverage are counted separately. Predictions never count as verified deadlines.

cycleGuidance.notes: The central timeline is approximate; use each programme page for an exact deadline.
The central application opening is announced, while deadlines remain programme-specific.
Oxford says guidance for applications made in 2026-27 will be available from mid-September 2026.
The degree programme application becomes available in September; no exact day is stated.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications open; deadlines vary by course
cycleGuidance.notes: Cambridge's directory is open for 2026/27, but each course has its own deadline and may close early.

universities.school: ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology)

cycleGuidance.notes: The applicable window depends on the country of the applicant's Bachelor's degree and scholarship/direct-doctorate status.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Check each course; many are currently open
cycleGuidance.notes: Admissions take place throughout the year, with visa-specific deadlines on individual course pages.
The official page gives a recurring month/day range without an explicit application-cycle year, so no exact calendar record is published.
The MSc Computer Science page publishes main and clearing deadlines but does not expose an exact application opening date, so no complete calendar window is published.
The Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence lists a 1 November to 31 March period for the August 2026 intake.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application is open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MS in Applied Data Science lists several exact deadlines through 23 June 2026, but its page does not state the exact opening date required for a complete calendar window.
The standard international route is closed; English-taught master's programmes may have different deadlines.
Penn Engineering's regular master's window is shared across its on-campus master's programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central application generally reopens in early September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Cornell gives only an approximate central opening. The Computer Science MEng publishes recurring February 1 and October 1 deadlines without an exact opening day for each intake.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Programme-specific rounds within the September 2025 to February 2026 cycle
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing programme published an exact second-round window from 1 January to 27 February 2026.
The EECS MEng page still displays the closed Fall 2026 cycle and its 14 January 2026 deadline, but does not state the exact opening day.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications can be submitted before each course closing date
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Information Technology lists 30 November 2026 for the February 2027 intake and 31 May 2027 for the July 2027 intake, but no exact opening day.

universities.school: The University of New South Wales

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications are accepted through the relevant UNSW or UAC portal
cycleGuidance.notes: The published 2026 term table gives closing dates but not a precise opening day, and the Master of Information Technology is subject to grouped offer rounds and capacity.
The exact opening day is not yet published. Yale lists 2 January 2027 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern time as the Computer Science MS deadline.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-November to 15 December, or 16 December to 31 March
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states recurring month/day periods without binding them to a calendar year, so no exact calendar window is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Informatics MSc: 1 February–31 May for winter; 1 October–30 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes stable month/day periods without an explicit cycle year, so they are retained as recurring guidance rather than exact calendar records.
The tracked Engineering for Professionals Computer Science MS accepts applications at any time and therefore has no finite application window.
The exact Fall 2027 opening day and Computer Science deadline are not yet published. The current Computer Science page still shows 15 December 2025 for Fall 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Generally two years before the semester start date
cycleGuidance.notes: Standard postgraduate closing rules are 31 January or 15 July for domestic applicants and 18 December or 29 May for international applicants. Exact course pages take precedence.

The thesis MSc lists 15 December for international applicants and 15 February for domestic applicants. The non-thesis MSc lists 15 December for both, but the page does not bind these dates to a calendar year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 January–24 February or 17 February–16 March 2026 for the main platform groups
cycleGuidance.notes: The tracked Master Informatique is listed under the Mon Master route for eligible profiles, with an exact 17 February to 16 March 2026 window.
Computer Science states that Fall 2027 applications will open in October 2026, but the exact opening day and deadline are not yet published.
The official English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure publishes two complete application phases for international applicants.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications usually open in mid-October for the following September
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing MSc is currently marked open, but the official guidance does not expose an exact opening day and its accessible course content does not state a finite closing date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 2027 direct applications are currently open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Domestic direct applications close 13 February or 17 July 2027. International applications generally close 15 December 2026 or 15 May 2027, with earlier programme exceptions.

universities.school: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications commenced 1 September 2025 at 09:00 Hong Kong time
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Computer Science closed on 31 January 2026. Other CUHK taught programmes use different rounds and deadlines.
The Computer Science MSc is closed for September 2026 and lists a 31 March 2026 deadline. The exact next-cycle opening day and deadline are not yet published.
Advanced Computer Science lists 7 November 2025, 2 January 2026, 27 February 2026, and 22 May 2026 selection deadlines. Later applications depend on availability.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Direct applications are available; exact opening and closing dates are not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Artificial Intelligence lists February and July starts and links both intakes to the direct application route, without publishing a complete dated window.
The IST application page gives a complete summer application period. The Computer Science guide states that its master's programme does not accept winter-examination applications.

The Computer Science MS FAQ lists January 15 as the fall priority deadline, February 15 as the fall final deadline, and October 15 as the spring deadline, without identifying the cycle year or opening day.
The official Spring 2027 international graduate guide gives a complete online application and document-upload period in Korea Standard Time.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Next exact dates are not configured; previous cycle deadline was 15 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The current central MSc page says upcoming intake dates are not yet configured. The department records 15 December 2025 for September 2026 or January 2027 starts, so a similar mid-December deadline is only a low-confidence prior-cycle reference.
The first two IP Paris portal sessions are common dated windows. The third session ran 27 March-28 May 2026 but is not represented as a general window because some programmes did not open for it.
The CS page lists review milestones on 30 November, 31 December, and 28 February, followed by rolling review language. It does not state one unambiguous final closing date for the MS application.
For the Master of Data Science, international deadlines are 30 November 2026 for Semester 1 and 31 May 2027 for Semester 2. Domestic deadlines are 31 January and 30 June 2027.

universities.school: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Information Technology lists three deadlines for local and non-local applicants: 1 November 2025, 1 January 2026, and 1 March 2026. The page describes admissions as rolling.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Expected around mid-September 2026; exact next-cycle date not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The current page says applications reopen in mid-September and the master's deadline is 15 January. A similar September 2026-January 2027 period is only a prior-cycle reference until the new cycle is dated explicitly.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Usually mid-September; exact next-cycle opening day not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The CS FAQ states that applications are submitted between mid-September and 15 December. The next cycle should be treated as a prior-cycle reference until exact dated guidance is published.

Computer Science is in the selected-programme group with a 15 January deadline for non-EU/EFTA applicants. EU/EFTA applicants use the 1 April deadline. The page does not label these dates with a cycle year.
The official guide lists scholarship deadlines on 15 December 2025, 15 February 2026, and 31 March 2026, with self-supported applications closing 31 May 2026.
The international admissions listing should be monitored for the next annual postgraduate guide. No complete 2027 application period is currently published.
The official international-student schedule gives a complete application period for Fall 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications have been allocated continuously since September 2025; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science conversion MSc closes on 27 August 2026 for overseas applicants and 21 September 2026 for home applicants, subject to earlier closure if full.
Most SCS graduate programmes have an 18 November early deadline and a 9 December final deadline. MHCI and several MSE routes have stated exceptions.
The joint Computer Science master's lists 1 June for Dutch-prior-education and EU/EEA applicants on the UvA page. VU publishes applicant-specific procedures for other international degrees.
The MSc in Information Technology had early and main deadlines on 15 October 2025 and 15 January 2026, followed by an extended deadline on 30 April 2026.
Tandon lists 1 December for fall priority consideration and 15 March as the extended final on-campus MS deadline. Computer Science MS does not accept spring applications.

universities.school: London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)

cycleGuidance.opensText: Open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc Data Science page says applications are open and considered on a rolling basis with no fixed deadline. Separate funding deadlines apply.
The Informatics guide gives a postal submission period of 5-19 June 2026; in-person submission is accepted on 19 June only.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 April-15 May for winter; 2 October-15 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes recurring strict deadlines without attaching a year, so these remain guidance rather than a cycle-specific formal window.
The central calendar covers Malaysian and international applicants to coursework and mixed-mode master's and doctoral programmes.
The tool confirms that academic year 2026/27 starts on 16 September 2026, but a single deadline cannot be generalized across nationalities and programmes.

universities.school: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals
Sorbonne University (merged from Paris IV & UPMC)
Trinity College Dublin, The University of Dublin
Pohang University of Science And Technology (POSTECH)
University of Science and Technology of China
Alma Mater Studiorum - University of Bologna
University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill
Khalifa University of Science and Technology
National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University
